arts.ttl: Hansi Flick talks Ter Stegen comeback as goalkeeper returns to training
arts.sum: Barcelona received quite the boost on Monday as club captain and starting goalkeeper Marc-André ter Stegen returned to training with his teammates for the first time since suffering a gruesome knee injury against Villarreal back in September. The German is now on the path to making a comeback sometime before the end of the season, and Hansi Flick was asked in a press conference on Tuesday when Ter Stegen could be making his return.

arts.ttl: Where to Watch FC Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid for Copa Del Rey Semifinal
arts.sum: FC Barcelona and Atlético Madrid will face off in the second leg of their Copa del Rey semifinal tie on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona announced as venue for England’s World Cup qualifier against Andorra
arts.sum: The game will be played at the RCDE Stadium, home of Espanyol.

arts.ttl: Barcelona offered chance to sign two big-name strikers in the summer
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have been offered the chance to bring in two altogether high-profile centre-forwards with a view to next season. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards…

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid vs Barcelona lineups: Confirmed team news, predicted XIs and injury latest for Copa del Rey
arts.sum: Raphinha should return for Barca while Diego Simeone faces several huge selection decisions

arts.ttl: Barcelona pump the brakes on agreed free agent signing
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona are no longer dead set on moving forward with a deal for a potential free agent summer signing. That’s according to Diario Sport,…

arts.ttl: Sources: Barça face Szczęsny, Ter Stegen dilemma
arts.sum: Barcelona would be allowed to reinstate Marc-André ter Stegen to their Champions League squad this season but only at the expense of Wojciech Szczęsny, sources have confirmed to ESPN.

arts.ttl: Flick: Raphinha, Cubarsí ready to return & how Barça will line up without Olmo
arts.sum: Hansi Flick spoke in a press conference on Tuesday and was asked about his plans for the lineup against Atleti, and the coach revealed that Raphinha and Pau Cubarsí will both be ready to play after missing the last two matches with slight injury issues. “[Raphinha] is already recovered to play tomorrow.

arts.ttl: Manchester City star videoed hobbling into Barcelona hospital on crutches – Further concern
arts.sum: Manchester City star Erling Haaland has been spotted at a hospital in Barcelona for medical tests on the ankle injury picked up against Bournemouth. El Chiringuito provide video footage of the Manchester City striker today, entering the unidentified hospital in Spain on crutches ahead of apparent scheduled medical tests. arts.ttl: Barcelona pair subjected to ‘tunnel of slaps’ during training
arts.sum: Two members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona were subjected to a traditional round of slaps during the club’s latest training session. That’s according to Barca insider…
